title_zh: AI 資本支出回本雷達
method_en: Tracks the four hyperscalers (Alphabet · Meta · Microsoft · Amazon) plus the two frontier labs (OpenAI · Anthropic) on one question: is the AI capex paying off yet — who is converting spend into revenue, and who is just burning? 'AI capex' and 'AI revenue' are NOT reported line items, so the board mixes hard numbers with flagged estimates. Total capex & revenue are LIVE from yfinance (cash-flow statement + income statement, TTM). The AI share of capex is a management-GUIDED estimate. Cloud segment revenue (Azure / Google Cloud / AWS) is the REPORTED hard floor; an AI-only revenue band sits beside it as OUR_EST. For the private labs there are no filings — revenue run-rate, burn, funding and compute commitments are fragmentary news/our-estimates, clearly tagged and directional only. Per company: an AI-capex coverage ratio (AI revenue ÷ AI spend), a 0–100 payback score and a verdict (MONETIZING / INVESTING / BURNING). The circularity ledger flags AI dollars looping between the same names. Seed values render the board offline.
method_zh: 用一個問題追蹤四大雲端巨頭(Alphabet · Meta · 微軟 · Amazon)加兩家前沿實驗室(OpenAI · Anthropic):AI 資本支出回本了沒 — 誰把投入轉成營收、誰只是在燒?「AI capex」與「AI 營收」皆非財報科目,故本看板硬數據與標記估計值並陳。總 capex 與總營收為 yfinance 即時值(現金流量表 + 損益表,TTM)。capex 中的 AI 佔比為管理層口徑(GUIDED)。雲端分部營收(Azure / Google Cloud / AWS)為 REPORTED 硬底;旁邊並列一條 AI-only 營收估計帶(OUR_EST)。私有實驗室無財報 — 營收 run-rate、年燒錢、募資與算力承諾皆為零碎新聞/本平台估計,明確標記、僅供方向參考。每家計算:AI 資本支出覆蓋率(AI 營收 ÷ AI 投入)、0–100 回本分數與結論(MONETIZING / INVESTING / BURNING)。循環性帳本標記在同一群名字之間轉圈的 AI 資金。種子值讓看板可離線渲染。

headline.verdict_en: INVESTING — heavy build, revenue ramping behind
headline.verdict_zh: INVESTING — 重壓建置,營收在後爬升

headline.verdict_en: INVESTING — heavy build, revenue ramping behind
headline.verdict_zh: INVESTING — 重壓建置,營收在後爬升

ai_capex_share.source_en: Mgmt: most of capex is servers & data centers for AI/Cloud (10-Q + calls)
ai_capex_share.source_zh: 管理層:多數 capex 為 AI/Cloud 的伺服器與資料中心(10-Q + 法說)

ai_rev_band.basis_en: Gemini API + Vertex AI + AI-attributed Cloud uplift; ad AI uplift excluded (un-isolable).
ai_rev_band.basis_zh: Gemini API + Vertex AI + AI 可歸因的 Cloud 增量;廣告 AI 增益未計(無法隔離)。

mgmt_quote.en: AI is driving Cloud growth and backlog; we are capacity-constrained and raising capex to meet demand.
mgmt_quote.zh: AI 正在帶動 Cloud 成長與在手訂單;我們產能受限,正提高 capex 以滿足需求。

companies.note_en: Cloud is the fastest-growing big segment; AI demand shows up as Cloud backlog. Capex high but revenue base huge → intensity moderate.
companies.note_zh: Cloud 是成長最快的大分部;AI 需求以 Cloud 在手訂單呈現。capex 高但營收基數龐大 → 強度中等。

ai_capex_share.source_en: Mgmt: capex tied to Azure AI demand; ~half finance leases for AI (10-Q + calls)
ai_capex_share.source_zh: 管理層:capex 綁定 Azure AI 需求;約半數為 AI 融資租賃(10-Q + 法說)

ai_rev_band.basis_en: Azure AI services run-rate + Copilot (M365/GitHub) seats; mgmt has guided an AI run-rate crossing ~$13B.
ai_rev_band.basis_zh: Azure AI 服務 run-rate + Copilot(M365/GitHub)席次;管理層曾口徑 AI run-rate 突破約 $13B。

companies.verdict_en: INVESTING — heavy build, revenue ramping behind
companies.verdict_zh: INVESTING — 重壓建置,營收在後爬升

mgmt_quote.en: Our AI business surpassed a multi-billion annual run-rate; Azure AI demand exceeds capacity into next year.
mgmt_quote.zh: 我們的 AI 業務已突破數十億美元年化 run-rate;Azure AI 需求到明年都超過產能。

companies.note_en: Highest capex acceleration of the four; Microsoft Cloud margin is rich, but AI-only revenue is still a fraction of AI capex.
companies.note_zh: 四家中 capex 加速最猛;微軟雲毛利豐厚,但 AI-only 營收仍只是 AI capex 的一小部分。

ai_capex_share.source_en: Mgmt: majority of capex is AWS infrastructure, driven by AI/GenAI (10-Q + calls)
ai_capex_share.source_zh: 管理層:多數 capex 為 AWS 基礎建設,由 AI/生成式 AI 驅動(10-Q + 法說)

ai_rev_band.basis_en: AWS AI/ML services (Bedrock, Trainium/Inferentia, SageMaker) run-rate; mgmt calls AI a multi-billion, triple-digit-growth business.
ai_rev_band.basis_zh: AWS AI/ML 服務(Bedrock、Trainium/Inferentia、SageMaker)run-rate;管理層稱 AI 為數十億美元、三位數成長的業務。

mgmt_quote.en: AWS AI is a multi-billion-dollar business growing triple digits; we'd grow faster if we had more capacity.
mgmt_quote.zh: AWS 的 AI 是一門數十億美元、三位數成長的業務;若有更多產能,我們會成長更快。

companies.note_en: Largest absolute capex; AWS growth slower than Google Cloud but the revenue base (whole company) is enormous → low capex intensity.
companies.note_zh: 絕對 capex 最大;AWS 成長慢於 Google Cloud,但營收基數(整家公司)龐大 → capex 強度低。

ai_capex_share.source_en: Mgmt: capex dominated by AI infra (training + recommendation/ads inference) (10-Q + calls)
ai_capex_share.source_zh: 管理層:capex 以 AI 基礎建設為主(訓練 + 推薦/廣告推論)(10-Q + 法說)

cloud.source_en: Family of Apps ad revenue (10-Q) — no cloud business; AI monetizes via ad efficiency
cloud.source_zh: Family of Apps 廣告營收(10-Q)— 無雲端業務;AI 透過廣告效率變現

ai_rev_band.basis_en: Meta sells no AI product directly — AI shows up as ad-targeting & engagement uplift, NOT a clean line. Band is intentionally wide; treat as directional.
ai_rev_band.basis_zh: Meta 不直接賣 AI 產品 — AI 體現為廣告投放與互動的增益,非乾淨科目。此帶刻意拉寬,僅供方向參考。

companies.verdict_en: INVESTING — heavy build, revenue ramping behind
companies.verdict_zh: INVESTING — 重壓建置,營收在後爬升

mgmt_quote.en: AI is improving ad performance and engagement today; the bigger bets (AGI, Llama) are multi-year and not yet monetized directly.
mgmt_quote.zh: AI 今天已在改善廣告成效與互動;更大的賭注(AGI、Llama)是多年期,尚未直接變現。

companies.note_en: Only one of the four with no cloud to sell compute — AI capex must pay back through ad efficiency, the hardest to isolate. Highest capex intensity, fastest capex acceleration.
companies.note_zh: 四家中唯一沒有雲端可賣算力 — AI capex 必須透過廣告效率回本,最難隔離。capex 強度最高、加速最快。

revenue_yoy.source_zh: 由前一年 run-rate 推算

annual_burn.source_en: Est. cash burn incl. compute & training
annual_burn.source_zh: 估計現金燒錢(含算力與訓練)

funding_raised.source_en: Cumulative equity raised (incl. Microsoft & later rounds)
funding_raised.source_zh: 累計募資(含微軟與後續輪)

compute_commitment.source_zh: 多年期算力承諾(微軟/Oracle/其他)

private.verdict_en: INVESTING — heavy build, revenue ramping behind
private.verdict_zh: INVESTING — 重壓建置,營收在後爬升

mgmt_quote.en: Revenue is growing fast but we are spending far more than we earn to scale compute; profitability is years out.
mgmt_quote.zh: 營收快速成長,但我們為了擴張算力,花的遠多於賺的;獲利還要很多年。

private.note_en: No filings — every figure here is fragmentary press/our-estimate, directional only. Massive compute commitments are the headline risk.
private.note_zh: 無財報 — 此處每個數字皆為零碎新聞/本平台估計,僅供方向參考。龐大算力承諾是最大風險。

revenue_yoy.source_zh: 由前一年 run-rate 推算(快速爬升)

annual_burn.source_en: Est. cash burn incl. compute & training
annual_burn.source_zh: 估計現金燒錢(含算力與訓練)

funding_raised.source_zh: 累計募資(含 Amazon 與 Google)

compute_commitment.source_zh: 多年期算力承諾(Amazon/Google 雲)

private.verdict_en: INVESTING — heavy build, revenue ramping behind
private.verdict_zh: INVESTING — 重壓建置,營收在後爬升

mgmt_quote.en: Enterprise/API revenue is compounding faster than OpenAI's early curve, but burn is large and compute-bound; funded by Amazon & Google.
mgmt_quote.zh: 企業/API 營收的複合成長快於 OpenAI 早期曲線,但燒錢大且受算力綁定;由 Amazon 與 Google 出資。

private.note_en: Faster revenue compounding and a leaner burn than OpenAI on these estimates, but the same compute-commitment dependency on its two cloud backers.
private.note_zh: 依這些估計,營收複合成長快於 OpenAI、燒錢較精實,但同樣對兩家雲端金主有算力承諾依賴。

edges.what_en: Nvidia investment/commitment tied to OpenAI buildout
edges.what_zh: Nvidia 對 OpenAI 建置的投資/承諾
OpenAI 多年期算力採購承諾
微軟對 OpenAI 的累計投資

edges.what_en: Amazon investment in Anthropic (cloud credits + equity)
edges.what_zh: Amazon 對 Anthropic 的投資(雲端額度 + 股權)
Google 對 Anthropic 的投資

edges.what_en: GPU purchases route compute dollars back to Nvidia — closing the loop
edges.what_zh: GPU 採購把算力支出送回 Nvidia — 閉合循環

companies.note_en: TPU-heavy fleet means less H100 write-down risk, but TPUs depreciate too; highest op income ($138B) absorbs shocks best.
companies.note_zh: TPU 為主的機隊使 H100 減損風險較低，但 TPU 同樣折舊；最高營益（$138B）最能吸收衝擊。

companies.note_en: Large H100 base partly for OpenAI; useful-life was extended to 6yr in 2022-23, so a reversal is a real margin lever.
companies.note_zh: 龐大 H100 基數部分供 OpenAI；2022-23 已將耐用年限延長至 6 年，故回調是真實的毛利槓桿。

companies.note_en: Trainium mix lowers H100 exposure, but fulfillment+AWS PP&E is huge ($486B); FCF already squeezed to ~$10B so any accel-dep bites hard.
companies.note_zh: Trainium 比重降低 H100 曝險，但履約+AWS PP&E 巨大（$486B）；FCF 已被壓到約 $10B，任何加速折舊都很痛。

companies.note_en: Heaviest H100 buyer (350K+ class) and almost all PP&E is servers/DC → most exposed to impairment + stranding.
companies.note_zh: 最大 H100 買家（35 萬顆級）且 PP&E 幾乎全為伺服器/資料中心 → 對減損+擱淺最敏感。

alerts.en: AI spend far ahead of AI revenue: across the four, AI capex ≈ $195.7B/yr vs AI-only revenue ≈ $56.5B (coverage 0.289). Still an investment phase, not a payback one.
alerts.zh: AI 投入遠超 AI 營收:四家合計 AI capex ≈ $195.7B/年 vs AI-only 營收 ≈ $56.5B(覆蓋率 0.289)。仍在投入期,非回本期。

alerts.en: Fastest converter: Alphabet (Google) (score 72.4, cloud +30.0%). Heaviest builder: Meta (score 51.8, capex intensity 37.1%).
alerts.zh: 變現最快:Alphabet(Google)(分數 72.4,雲端 +30.0%)。投入最重:Meta(分數 51.8,capex 強度 37.1%)。

alerts.en: Capex outrunning revenue: Meta capex +71.1%/yr vs revenue +16.7%/yr — the depreciation tail will land on margins before the AI revenue does.
alerts.zh: capex 跑贏營收:Meta capex +71.1%/年 vs 營收 +16.7%/年 — 折舊尾巴會比 AI 營收更早壓上毛利。

alerts.en: Depreciation tail: a useful-life reversal + stranded-chip retirement would add ≈ $59.6B/yr of depreciation across the four (12.9% of combined operating income), plus a $29.4B one-time H100 write-down. Most exposed: Amazon at 27.9% of its operating income.
alerts.zh: 折舊尾巴:耐用年限回調 + 擱淺晶片提前汰換,四家合計每年多 ≈ $59.6B 折舊(占合計營益 12.9%),另加一次性 H100 減損 $29.4B。最敏感:Amazon,達其營益的 27.9%。

alerts.en: Burn intensity: capex is eating most of operating cash flow — Amazon (91.1% of OCF). Little free cash left to fund the AI build internally; further acceleration needs balance-sheet or debt.
alerts.zh: 燒錢強度:capex 吃掉大部分營運現金流 — Amazon (91.1% of OCF)。內部自籌 AI 建置的自由現金所剩無幾;再加速須動用資產負債表或舉債。

alerts.en: Circularity flag: ≈ $400.0B of multi-year purchase commitments (flow) plus ≈ $24.0B of cumulative equity investments (stock) loop between Nvidia, the labs and the clouds — some 'AI revenue' is the same dollars circulating, not independent end-demand. (Flow + stock is a heterogeneous gauge of entanglement, not an additive total.)
alerts.zh: 循環性警示:約 $400.0B 多年期採購承諾(流量)加上約 $24.0B 累計股權投資(存量),在 Nvidia、實驗室與雲端之間轉圈 — 部分「AI 營收」是同一批資金循環,非獨立終端需求。(流量+存量為糾纏規模,非可加總計。)

payback_read.en: Not yet. Across the four, AI capex ≈ $195.7B/yr dwarfs the AI-only revenue ≈ $56.5B (coverage 0.289) — a $139.2B gap. This is an INVESTMENT phase, funded by hugely profitable core businesses (cloud revenue $499.0B). Alphabet (Google) is converting fastest (score 72.4, cloud +30.0%); Meta is in the heaviest build (score 51.8).
payback_read.zh: 還沒。四家合計 AI capex ≈ $195.7B/年,遠大於 AI-only 營收 ≈ $56.5B(覆蓋率 0.289)— 缺口 $139.2B。這是投入期,由極賺錢的本業(雲端營收 $499.0B)支撐。Alphabet(Google) 變現最快(分數 72.4,雲端 +30.0%);Meta 投入最重(分數 51.8)。

circularity_read.en: ≈ $424.0B across 6 tracked links loops between Nvidia, the labs and the clouds. GPU purchases route compute spend back to Nvidia, whose investments seed the labs, whose commitments fill the clouds — so part of the apparent AI demand is the same dollars circulating. Treat gross 'AI revenue' with that discount.
circularity_read.zh: 約 $424.0B、6 條追蹤連結在 Nvidia、實驗室與雲端之間轉圈。GPU 採購把算力支出送回 Nvidia,其投資灌入實驗室,實驗室的承諾再填回雲端 — 故部分表面 AI 需求是同一批資金循環。看待毛額 AI 營收應打此折扣。

company_takes.en: MONETIZING — coverage 0.267, cloud +30.0%, capex intensity 20.3%. Cloud is the fastest-growing big segment; AI demand shows up as Cloud backlog. Capex high but revenue base huge → intensity moderate.
company_takes.zh: MONETIZING — 覆蓋率 0.267,雲端 +30.0%,capex 強度 20.3%。Cloud 是成長最快的大分部;AI 需求以 Cloud 在手訂單呈現。capex 高但營收基數龐大 → 強度中等。

company_takes.en: INVESTING — coverage 0.306, cloud +22.0%, capex intensity 31.0%. Highest capex acceleration of the four; Microsoft Cloud margin is rich, but AI-only revenue is still a fraction of AI capex.
company_takes.zh: INVESTING — 覆蓋率 0.306,雲端 +22.0%,capex 強度 31.0%。四家中 capex 加速最猛;微軟雲毛利豐厚,但 AI-only 營收仍只是 AI capex 的一小部分。

company_takes.en: MONETIZING — coverage 0.255, cloud +19.0%, capex intensity 15.4%. Largest absolute capex; AWS growth slower than Google Cloud but the revenue base (whole company) is enormous → low capex intensity.
company_takes.zh: MONETIZING — 覆蓋率 0.255,雲端 +19.0%,capex 強度 15.4%。絕對 capex 最大;AWS 成長慢於 Google Cloud,但營收基數(整家公司)龐大 → capex 強度低。

company_takes.en: INVESTING — coverage 0.33, cloud +18.0%, capex intensity 37.1%. Only one of the four with no cloud to sell compute — AI capex must pay back through ad efficiency, the hardest to isolate. Highest capex intensity, fastest capex acceleration.
company_takes.zh: INVESTING — 覆蓋率 0.33,雲端 +18.0%,capex 強度 37.1%。四家中唯一沒有雲端可賣算力 — AI capex 必須透過廣告效率回本,最難隔離。capex 強度最高、加速最快。

company_takes.en: INVESTING — est. revenue $20.0B vs burn $35.0B (coverage 0.571), ~1.7y funded runway. No filings — every figure here is fragmentary press/our-estimate, directional only. Massive compute commitments are the headline risk.
company_takes.zh: INVESTING — 估營收 $20.0B vs 燒錢 $35.0B(覆蓋率 0.571),約 1.7 年募資跑道。無財報 — 此處每個數字皆為零碎新聞/本平台估計,僅供方向參考。龐大算力承諾是最大風險。

company_takes.en: INVESTING — est. revenue $12.0B vs burn $18.0B (coverage 0.667), ~1.7y funded runway. Faster revenue compounding and a leaner burn than OpenAI on these estimates, but the same compute-commitment dependency on its two cloud backers.
company_takes.zh: INVESTING — 估營收 $12.0B vs 燒錢 $18.0B(覆蓋率 0.667),約 1.7 年募資跑道。依這些估計,營收複合成長快於 OpenAI、燒錢較精實,但同樣對兩家雲端金主有算力承諾依賴。

leading_signals.en: Cloud backlog / RPO (remaining performance obligations) — AI demand books before it bills.
leading_signals.zh: 雲端在手訂單 / RPO(履約義務餘額)— AI 需求在入帳前先簽約。

leading_signals.en: Next-quarter capex guidance — the clearest tell on whether the build is still accelerating.
leading_signals.zh: 下一季 capex 指引 — 建置是否仍在加速最清楚的訊號。

leading_signals.en: Depreciation & useful-life changes — the capex tail that lands on margins before AI revenue does.
leading_signals.zh: 折舊與耐用年限變動 — 比 AI 營收更早壓上毛利的 capex 尾巴。

leading_signals.en: Frontier-lab funding rounds & valuations (OpenAI/Anthropic) — the loop's solvency.
leading_signals.zh: 前沿實驗室募資輪與估值(OpenAI/Anthropic)— 循環的償付能力。

leading_signals.en: Compute-commitment headlines (Nvidia ↔ labs ↔ clouds) — circularity expanding or unwinding.
leading_signals.zh: 算力承諾頭條(Nvidia ↔ 實驗室 ↔ 雲端)— 循環在擴張或瓦解。

scenarios.trigger_en: Cloud growth re-accelerates AND AI-only run-rate doubles while capex growth flattens — coverage climbs toward 0.5
scenarios.trigger_zh: Cloud 成長再加速且 AI-only run-rate 翻倍,同時 capex 成長趨平 — 覆蓋率升向 0.5

scenarios.trigger_en: Capex keeps rising ~with revenue; coverage stuck ~0.2–0.3 for several more quarters
scenarios.trigger_zh: capex 與營收同步續升;覆蓋率卡在約 0.2–0.3 再撐數季

scenarios.trigger_en: One or more hyperscalers guides capex flat/down as utilization questions surface
scenarios.trigger_zh: 一家以上巨頭因使用率疑慮而口徑 capex 持平/下修

scenarios.trigger_en: A frontier lab misses funding/revenue, compute commitments are renegotiated, the money loop contracts
scenarios.trigger_zh: 某前沿實驗室募資/營收不如預期,算力承諾被重談,資金循環收縮

falsification.en: A hyperscaler reports AI-only revenue ≥ its AI capex run-rate — the 'capex ahead of revenue' thesis breaks for that name.
falsification.zh: 某巨頭揭露 AI-only 營收 ≥ 其 AI capex run-rate — 該公司「capex 領先營收」的論點破裂。

falsification.en: Cloud growth re-accelerates above +35% YoY across two of the three clouds — INVESTING verdicts should move toward MONETIZING.
falsification.zh: 三家雲端中有兩家 Cloud 成長重回 +35% 以上 YoY — INVESTING 結論應移向 MONETIZING。

falsification.en: A frontier lab turns cash-flow positive — its BURNING verdict is wrong.
falsification.zh: 某前沿實驗室轉為現金流為正 — 其 BURNING 結論即錯誤。

watch.zh: 季度 capex 指引(四大巨頭)

watch.en: Cloud segment growth: Azure / Google Cloud / AWS
watch.zh: 雲端分部成長:Azure / Google Cloud / AWS
管理層 AI run-rate 揭露(若有)

watch.en: Depreciation & expected useful-life changes (capex tail into margin)
watch.zh: 折舊與耐用年限變動(capex 尾巴壓毛利)

watch.en: Frontier-lab revenue run-rate & funding rounds (OpenAI / Anthropic)
watch.zh: 前沿實驗室營收 run-rate 與募資輪(OpenAI / Anthropic)
算力承諾與循環融資新聞(Nvidia ↔ 實驗室 ↔ 雲端)

watch.en: Free cash flow vs capex — is the buildout still self-funded?
watch.zh: 自由現金流 vs capex — 建置是否仍自給自足?

blind_spots_en: 'AI capex' is an estimate: companies report TOTAL capex, not an AI line. The AI share is management-guided, not audited.
'AI revenue' is mostly un-isolable: cloud segment revenue is the hard floor; the AI-only band is OUR_EST. Meta's band is intentionally wide (AI monetizes via ad efficiency, not a product line).
Private-lab figures (OpenAI/Anthropic) are fragmentary press/our-estimates with no filings — directional only, not comparable to the audited hyperscalers.
Capex turns into depreciation over years; a low coverage today understates eventual return if utilization rises — but also hides margin pressure as the D&A tail lands.
Circular financing means some 'revenue' is the same dollars looping between Nvidia, the labs and the clouds — gross figures overstate independent end-demand.
blind_spots_zh: 「AI capex」是估計值:公司揭露的是「總」capex,沒有 AI 科目。AI 佔比為管理層口徑,未經審計。
「AI 營收」多半無法隔離:雲端分部營收是硬底;AI-only 帶為本平台估計。Meta 的帶刻意拉寬(AI 透過廣告效率變現,非產品線)。
私有實驗室數字(OpenAI/Anthropic)為零碎新聞/本平台估計,無財報 — 僅供方向,不可與受審計的巨頭直接相比。
capex 會在數年內轉為折舊;今日的低覆蓋率若使用率上升會低估最終回報 — 但也掩蓋了 D&A 尾巴落地時的毛利壓力。
循環融資意味部分「營收」是同一批資金在 Nvidia、實驗室與雲端之間轉圈 — 毛額會高估獨立的終端需求。
